description: Listen to this first — reference for the Acoustic Guitar block. Do not rate.
The global level has been reduced by 6 dB. Same content, quieter.
The global level has been increased by 6 dB. Same content, louder.
Frequencies above 1 kHz removed. Only bass and low mids remain — dull, no highs.
Frequencies above 2 kHz removed. Less high-frequency detail.
Frequencies above 4 kHz removed. Slight loss of brightness.
Volume modulated at 70 Hz with 50% depth. Mild roughness/beating sensation.
Volume modulated at 70 Hz with 100% depth. Strong roughness/beating sensation.
